markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on 2026 content strategy and Q1 priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** High organic traffic yields low-quality leads, while high-quality referral leads lack scalable volume.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Solution:** Improve organic lead quality by aligning content with a new "agency/studio" brand refresh and creating "experiential" assets (e.g., interactive guides) to replace outdated PDFs.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Q1 Focus:** A content audit will guide a "pruning" initiative to refresh stale content, fix technical SEO, and consolidate assets, while still creating net-new content.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Webstacks will own the content audit and pruning; GrowthX will own net-new content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)

## Topics

### 2025 Retrospective: What Worked & What Didn't

  - [**What Worked Well:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Pillar Strategy:** Effective for driving quick traffic, though implementation was inconsistent.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**LLM Traffic:** Webstacks' site performs exceptionally well, suggesting strong on-page SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [**Content Quality:** Significantly improved, building trust in the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
      - [**Content Variety:** "Coffee chats" (from Gong recordings) provide valuable supplementary content.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
      - [**Growing Clusters:** "SaaS Marketing" and "Design" topics (Website Design, UX/UI) are gaining momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**What Didn't Work Well:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Content Maintenance:** Focus was on expansion, neglecting pruning and refreshing stale content.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
      - [**Strategic Focus:** Too many ideas led to shifting priorities and unfinished initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Asset Performance:** Low click-through from the blog to downloadable assets and capabilities pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
          - [**Cause:** Too many conversion options and inconsistent CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

### 2026 Strategic Priorities & Audience

  - [**Pipeline Quality vs. Volume:** The goal is to find a balance between the high volume of organic leads and the high quality of referral leads.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Brand Refresh:** A shift from a "software company" perception to an "agency/studio" brand.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Impact:** Requires a new blog experience and more engaging content formats.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Experiential Assets:** Replace static PDFs with interactive guides (e.g., the Webflow State of Report) to improve engagement and conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create one major asset per quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [**Audience Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [**Primary:** Unchanged.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Technical Decision Makers (e.g., CIOs) interested in AI's impact on websites.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
      - [**Tertiary:** Evangelist Influencers (partners, AEs) who need comparison articles and use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [**Internal:** Client Champions, for whom "coffee chat" insights will be integrated into content.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)

### Q1 2026 Plan: Audit-Driven Pruning & New Assets

  - [**Content Audit:** Will guide Q1 initiatives, focusing on quick wins and cluster-by-cluster optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
  - [**Pruning Initiative:**](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)
      - [**Quick Wins:** Fix non-indexed pages and other low-hanging fruit.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
      - [**Cluster-by-Cluster Optimization:** Systematically prune, merge, and refresh content within each topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
      - [**Stale Content:** Refresh older posts (update dates, add FAQs) to improve search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
  - [**New Asset Idea: Playbook Pages**](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
      - [**Concept:** Simple landing pages with "chapters" linking to related blog posts, videos, and assets.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
      - [**Benefits:** Improves internal linking, creates a lightweight experiential asset, and serves as a sales tool.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesse:** Share the CMS export (with content tags) and 1–2 partner demo recordings with Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Jesse:** Refine the 2026 strategy doc with Q1 initiatives and share with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=3073.0)
  - [**Jesse & Jakub:** Define ownership for audit-driven tasks (e.g., Webstacks owns pruning, GrowthX owns net-new content).](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
  - [**All:** Finalize the Q1 90-day plan in the first meeting of January.](https://fathom.video/share/zrpfGG5SKa5xyXz_muyvyxYPKCWkDtFr?tab=summary&timestamp=3044.0)
